info.title: Listing Service v53
info.description:
The Property24 Listing Service is a Web Service using REST that can be used to manage real estate organizations, agencies and agents that your service account has access to, as well as to publish property listings directly to the www.property24.com web portal.

HTTPS is used for requests and responses, and payloads are formatted in JSON.

Basic Authentication is required for all requests. The Authorization header is used and is constructed as Basic base64(username@property24.com:password).

For example, the following would be used in the Authorization header:
Basic dXNlcm5hbWVAcHJvcGVydHkyNC5jb206cGFzc3dvcmQ=.

Please include your User Group ID in the request header P24-UserGroupId.

When saving a listing, please only include the photos if they have changed. This will reduce the size of requests and improve response times.

For example: A new listing is saved with 5 photos. Some time later, the description needs to be updated. In this second request, the photos are not changing. So please set photos to null.
NB: setting photos to [] (an empty array) will remove all photos from the listing.

Sample App (in C#)

get.summary:
Fetches statistics for agencies between certain dates. Maximum date range is 62 days. If the date range is larger
than 62 days an exception is thrown.
get.description:
Example: when setting StartDate to '2022-01-01' and EndDate to '2022-02-01'
then all data from the month of January 2022 will be included, but nothing from February.


Statistics are aggregated by day at the end of each day, so data for 2022-01-01 will only be available on 2022-01-02.

parameters.name: agencyIds
parameters.description: Identifies the agencies to retrieve the statistics of.

parameters.name: listingType
parameters.description: Specifies the type of listing to get the statistics of.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of range, inclusive.  Time of day is not supported.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of range, exclusive. Time of day is not supported.

get.summary: Fetches statistics for a single listing between certain dates. Maximum date range is 62 days. If the date range is larger than 62 days an exception is thrown.
get.description:
Example: when setting startDate to '2022-01-01' and endDate to '2022-02-01'
then all data from the month of January 2022 will be included, but nothing from February.


Statistics are aggregated by day at the end of each day, so data for 2022-01-01 will only be available on 2022-01-02.

parameters.name: listingNumber
parameters.description: Identifies the listing to retrieve the statistics of.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start of date range, inclusive. Time of day is not supported.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of date range, exclusive. Time of day is not supported.

get.summary:
Fetches messages sent to agents for a listing between certain dates. Maximum date range is 62 days. If the date
range is larger than 62 days an exception is thrown.
get.description:
Note: the date range delimited by the startDate and endDate parameters
starts on the point in time contained in startDate (in other words data that corresponds to this
precise point in time is included) and ends just before the point in time contained in endDate.
This means that data that corresponds to the exact end point is not included.
<para />
Example: when setting startDate to '2022-01-01' and endDate to '2022-02-01'
then all data from the month of January 2022 will be included, but nothing from February.

parameters.name: listingNumber
parameters.description: Identifies the listing for which to retrieve messages.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description:
Starting point of the date range messages are retrieved for. This point in time is
            included in the range.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description:
End point of the date range messages are retrieved for. This point in time is excluded
            from the range.

get.summary:
Fetches messages sent to agents for all listings of agencies the calling user account has access to, that occured after the specified time.
This method returns a maximum of 1000 messages per response. To get the next 1000 messages, take the nextAfter property from the first response and
use it as the after parameter in the second request, etc.
The after parameter cannot be older than 30 days ago.
get.description: This method is not available to all vendors. If you are interested in using this method or would like more information, please contact our support team.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Fetch messages after this time.

get.summary:
Fetches the ListingStatisticsSummaryPeriods object which will give you the periods that statistics are available for.
The IDs are used to fetch listing lead statistics. If the period ID is null, then there are no statistics for the corresponding period.
Fetches a list of ListingStatisticsSummary, which is a summary of the statistics per area.

parameters.name: periodIds
parameters.description: The identities of the listing statistics summary periods to retrieve the statistics of. The IDs are obtained by fetching the listing lead statistics periods.

parameters.name: listingType
parameters.description: Specifies the type of listing to get the statistics of.

parameters.name: agencyIds
parameters.description: Identifies the agencies to retrieve the statistics of.

parameters.name: suburbIds
parameters.description: Identifies the suburbs to retrieve the statistics of.

post.summary:
Saves a new or updated listing. For new listings the ListingNumber field must be empty, and for existing listings
that are being updated the ListingNumber field must identify the listing that is being changed.
post.description:
Notes: * When updating a listing, please only include the photos if they have changed. This will reduce the size of requests and improve response times.
For example: A new listing is saved with 5 photos. Some time later, the description needs to be updated. In this update request, the photos are not changing. So please set ```photos``` to null.
NB: setting ```photos``` to ```[]``` (an empty array) will remove all photos from the listing. * SourceReference is mandatory for Agent. It is therefore illegal to save a listing with a listing agent with null or empty SourceReference values. * The recommended image resolution for listings is 1920x1080. * A show day’s duration can only span a max of 24 hours.

listingNumber.description:
A unique listing number from Property24 listing number range. Do not provide a value for this when creating
a new listing.

price.description: Asking price of property. If the Price is 0, then POA will be displayed. Defaults to 0.

isPOA.description: Indicates if the Listing should display the price as “POA”. Defaults to false.

occupationDate.description: The date of occupation for the new owner / tenant. Optional.

description.description: Description of property to be displayed on listing.
description.example: Three-bedroom home in great condition, with ample space for kids and pets.

descriptionHeader.description: Header of the description that is displayed on listing. Optional.
descriptionHeader.example: A beautiful home or a lovely investment opportunity

showDays.description: Information about the property’s showdays. Optional.

photos.description:
Images of the property.
When adding a new listing, you must provide at least one image.
When making an update to an existing listing, that doesn't involve the images (e.g. changing the price or
description), you can pass in null for this property to indicate that there are no changes to the images.
To remove all images from a listing, you must pass in an empty array (not null).

developmentId.description: ID of a development the listing is in, if applicable. Optional.

repossessed.description: Indicates whether the property is a repossession. Defaults to false.

youTubeVideoId.description:
YouTube video id used to display YouTube video on listing. Only the unique video id and not the whole YouTube
URL should be passed. Optional.

matterportSpaceId.description: Matterport space id used to display a 3D Tour on listing. Optional.

noTransferCost.description:
Indicates if the property does/not have a transfer cost associated with it.
True if the property listing has no transfer cost associated with it. Defaults to false.

eyeSpy360Url.description: Url for displaying an embedded EyeSpy360 control. Optional.

isMultiListing.description:
When set to true, listing will appear in searches on SiteCreator Multiple Listing Sites (MLS). These sites
expose listings for a group of agencies that are part of an MLS Group. Listings must opt in
to be shown on these sites.

ListingStatus.description:
This enumeration type represents the options available for the status of a listing.

Members:

  • NewListing: New property placed on the market.
  • Active: Listing has been active for 7 days or more.
  • Rented: Property has been Let.
  • Withdrawn: Property has been removed temporarily from the market.
  • BackOnMarket: 'Withdrawn' property placed back on the market.
  • Expired: Mandate has expired.
  • Extended: Mandate has been extended.
  • RaisedPrice: Asking price of property has been increased.
  • ReducedPrice: Asking price of property has been reduced.
  • Cancelled: Mandate has been cancelled.
  • Pending: Property has been sold pending fulfilment of suspensive conditions.
  • Sold: Property has been sold.
  • CancelledSale: Sale of property has been cancelled.

  • ExclusiveUseArea: This describes an Exclusive Use sectional scheme as the deeds office would. Applicable fields for ExclusiveUseArea: SchemeName, SchemeNumber, ExclusiveUseAreaNumber
